parameters.name: sigma
parameters.override_behavior: scales the held deterministic perturbation added to vin_i

parameters.name: dt
parameters.override_behavior: sets the periodic interval between perturbation-sample updates

evaluation_summary.full_credit: valid candidate and reference pass and all five negatives killed behaviorally

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic periodic sample-and-hold updates rather than physical noise analysis or random simulator state.
Apply sigma only as a perturbation scale and preserve the continuously observed vin_i contribution.
Do not add undeclared seed inputs, files, ports, or validation-only sequence branches.

properties.observable_contract: The deterministic perturbation sample updates once every dt seconds.
Between update events, the perturbation vout_o minus vin_i remains piecewise constant.
At all times after the first update, vout_o equals vin_i plus sigma times the currently held normalized perturbation sample.
The normalized perturbation sample repeats the public eight-sample sequence [-1.0, -0.5, 0.0, 0.5, 1.0, 0.5, 0.0, -0.5], advancing by one entry at each dt update.
Every complete eight-sample sequence period is exactly zero mean, and every perturbation is bounded within [-sigma, +sigma].

title: Dither Noise Like Deterministic Source
